chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7394 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.32475/2021 2. For hearing of main case 27.05.2025 Mr. Imran Iqbal Khan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr.Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. On the last date following order was passed:- [ “26.05.2025 Mr. Imran Iqbal Khan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General This is a case of non-finalization of assessment within time mandated per the Customs Act, 1969. Learned counsel for respondent seeks time to obtain instructions. Since this petition is pending since 2021, at his request to come up on tomorrow i.e. 27.05.2025. Interim order passed earlier to continue till the next date of hearing. “ Today, learned counsel for the respondent is present and submits under instructions that pursuant to Section 81 and the provisional assessment has attained finality and the respondent shall issue the relevant order in recognition thereof forthwith and he further states that the security put in place to secure the obligation shall also be released immediately. In view hereof, learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition appears to have served its purpose may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
